diabetes.name: Diabetes
diabetes.description: A chronic condition that affects how the body processes blood sugar (glucose).
diabetes.gemini_prompt: Explain diabetes in simple terms, why these symptoms occur, precautions, and when to consult a doctor.

heart_disease.name: Heart Disease
heart_disease.description: A condition affecting the heart and blood vessels.
heart_disease.gemini_prompt: Explain heart disease, risks of chest pain, lifestyle precautions, and when immediate medical help is needed.

kidney_disease.name: Kidney Disease
kidney_disease.description: A condition where kidneys lose their ability to filter waste properly.
kidney_disease.gemini_prompt: Explain kidney disease symptoms, causes, diet precautions, and when to consult a doctor.

liver_disease.name: Liver Disease
liver_disease.description: A condition affecting liver function and detoxification.
liver_disease.gemini_prompt: Explain liver disease, causes of jaundice, precautions, and when medical attention is required.

malaria.name: Malaria
malaria.description: A mosquito-borne infectious disease caused by parasites.
malaria.gemini_prompt: Explain malaria symptoms, how it spreads, precautions, and when to seek urgent care.

pneumonia.name: Pneumonia
pneumonia.description: An infection that inflames the air sacs in one or both lungs.
pneumonia.gemini_prompt: Explain pneumonia, breathing risks, recovery steps, and when hospitalization is required.
